crossBrowserConsistency.summary: All three browsers (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit) render identically at all four breakpoints (375, 768, 1024, 1440). No cross-browser visual discrepancies observed.

visualSelfConsistencyAudit.summary: Without Figma comparison, performed a thorough visual consistency audit of the implementation across breakpoints and block variations. All carousel instances render correctly with proper dark background containers, typography, navigation controls, and responsive behavior.

observations: Dark charcoal background container with rounded-3xl corners renders correctly on all instances
Container padding is visible and consistent across all block instances
Heading area properly positioned at top of each section with white text on dark background
Pagination progress bar and navigation arrows properly aligned in a horizontal bar between heading and carousel slides
Cards display in a horizontal carousel layout with proper slide sizing
No content overflow or clipping observed at any breakpoint
Cards maintain equal height within each carousel via CSS height chain
Approximately 3-4 cards visible per viewport width, consistent with typical carousel behavior
Dark background extends to proper width with rounded corners, inset from page edges
Navigation arrows are clearly visible white circles in top-right area
Pagination bar spans the space between autoplay toggle (if present) and navigation arrows
Heading text is white, large display font (Anton-style), consistent across all sections
Cards contain images at top, text content below, maintaining equal height
Proper horizontal gap between carousel slides
Layout properly adapts with approximately 3 cards visible
Dark background and rounded corners maintained
Navigation and pagination remain properly aligned
Cards maintain proper proportions and readability
Approximately 2 cards visible per viewport
Container padding adjusts for narrower viewport
Heading stacks properly, no overflow
Navigation arrows and pagination bar remain functional and visible
Single card visible per slide, cards take full width
Heading text scales down appropriately without overflow
Dark background extends edge-to-edge with proper side gutter inset via --side-gutter variable
Navigation elements remain accessible and properly positioned
Cards maintain readable text sizes and proper image aspect ratios
Long heading instances wrap gracefully across multiple lines without overflow

blockVariations.summary: Multiple block instances visible covering diverse configurations: automatic/manual/related sources, multiple post types (blog, team, resources, policies), various carousel settings (autoplay, loop, navigation, pagination toggles).
keyObservations: Standard blog carousel: renders with cards showing featured images, titles, and metadata
Team member carousel: displays with distinct neon-green/yellow card backgrounds, appropriate for team_member post type styling
Resource carousel: renders with proper card styling for resource post type
Policy carousel: renders with proper card styling for policy post type
Manual mode (Featured Posts section): shows section header with empty carousel area when no posts selected — expected behavior
Long heading section: very long heading wraps gracefully without overflow on all breakpoints
Minimal carousel (no nav/pagination): clean appearance without navigation or pagination elements
Autoplay carousel: autoplay toggle button visible as expected

observations: Section headings use large bold display font (Anton-style), white color on dark background — consistent across all instances
Card titles are readable at all breakpoints with appropriate font weight
Body text/descriptions appear in regular weight, maintaining good readability
No visible text truncation or overflow issues at any breakpoint
Dark charcoal background (bg-charcoal) consistently applied as pseudo-element background on all instances
White text on dark background provides strong contrast ratio
Neon-green gradient visible on accent elements — CSS locks gradient colors via --gradient-left/--gradient-right custom properties
Team member cards show distinct neon-green/yellow card backgrounds — different card styling per post type
Navigation buttons appear as light-colored circles on dark background with adequate contrast
Consistent vertical padding (py-18 / md:py-23 = 72px / 92px) on all instances
Heading-to-carousel spacing (mb-8 / md:mb-16 = 32px / 64px) uniform across sections
Pagination bar margin-bottom (mb-6 = 24px) consistent
Card gaps appear consistent across all carousel instances
Navigation button gap (gap-2 / md:gap-4 = 8px / 16px) consistent
Dark background container uses rounded-3xl (24px) corners consistently on all instances
Card images have rounded corners consistent with theme card component patterns
Pagination bar uses rounded-full for pill-shape appearance

notes.observation: The manual-mode carousel section 'Featured Posts' renders the section wrapper and heading but shows an empty carousel area when no posts are selected. This is technically correct behavior, but visually appears as a dark section with just a heading.
notes.recommendation: Consider whether hideIfEmpty should be enabled by default for manual mode to avoid showing empty carousel sections.
